dataset_datashack_2026/alta_moda_1987-88.description: Jacket in black grain de poudre wool. High waist, amphora shape. Radial arm construction with narrowing toward lower edge of sleeve. Round tip lapels down to waist. One-button closure. Besom pockets, plus a flap pocket on left. Knee-skimming length. Black silk crepe de chine lining. Skirt in black grain de poudre wool. dataset_datashack_2026/alta_moda_1987-88.remark: Here’s a 20th century take (very much in feminine version) on the 18th century young man’s redingote. Distinguishing features include the silk crêpe fabric complete with meticulous cutwork: the classic eyelet effect is the amazing result of hand craftsmanship performed on the finished garment.
dataset_datashack_2026/alta_moda_1987-88.description: Dress redingote style in black cutwork silk crêpe with black silk satin lining. Slim bodice with little lapel collar, padded shoulders, long narrow sleeves. Front metal-clasp closure with small overlay. Skirt with lovely A-line flare. Under the collar are big black organza & velvet leaf appliqués, with matching topstitched silk satin ribbon to knot below. Black organza lining for top part of the dress. Then for added fullness, the flaring skirt has a big nylon flounce on the inside.
dataset_datashack_2026/alta_moda_1987-88.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)

Two black silk taffeta ribbons (20 cm wide) with 1 cm parallel topstitching at sides of upper back knot into a bow.

dataset_datashack_2026/alta_moda_1987-88.remark: Again, the outstanding feature is an artful exaggeration of volumes and proportions revealing the designer’s love of hyperbole. As for a totally new effect, it’s there in how the large skirt rests on the short one underneath simply by making the most of a natural drape. With additional support from the big velvet bow.
dataset_datashack_2026/alta_moda_1987-88.description: Dress bustier/ballgown style in silk faille with giant stripes (black, white, lilac, silver). Eight-part construction, hourglass shape with skinny bodice and voluminous skirt. Black silk gazar lining. Skirt in black velvet with 1 cm topstitching. Slim fit, mid-thigh length. Black velvet ribbon with decorative topstitching knotted into a bow at front waist.

dataset_datashack_2026/alta_moda_1987-88.remark: This dress captures an at once perfect and singular balance of shapes, volumes, proportions: an amazing sum of parts in sublime opposition to one another.
dataset_datashack_2026/alta_moda_1987-88.description: Dress in brown silk taffeta with decorative topstitching. Slim strapless bodice in double layer of silk faille (30 cm wide ribbon) crisscrossing neatly in front and then knotting obi style in back. Under the bustline a circular panel of topstitched silk taffeta flares beautifully outward from large fluid pleats.
